title: Intent Checkpoint
description: intent_checkpoint.json — the accepted scope and intent for a run, confirmed by the host (or auto-completed headlessly) before planning. Single-sourced across audit-code and remediate-code: audit-code consumes `excluded_scope`/`must_not_touch`/`free_form_intent` to prune planning and thread intent into worker prompts; remediate-code additionally uses `filters` to narrow findings. Sits upstream of the planning artifacts in the staleness DAG.

confirmed_by.description: `host` — reviewed and confirmed by the host agent (or the headless harness acting as host). `draft` — preliminary, pre-populated by synthesize_intake; planning must not begin and filtering must not apply until confirmed.

scope_summary.description: Human-readable description of the confirmed scope.

intent_summary.description: Human-readable description of the goal (e.g. full-audit / delta / security-focused).

free_form_intent.description: Free-form intent threaded into worker/dispatch prompts.

excluded_scope.description: Paths intentionally excluded from the run; pruned from planning and listed in the report.

path.description: Path or path prefix to exclude.

must_not_touch.description: Path globs that must never be written to.

filters.description: Remediate-only finding filters; audit-code ignores these.

constraint_clauses.description: free_form_intent clauses that could not be encoded as lens/priority/scope signals, kept as explicit machine-checkable constraints.

checkpoint_question.description: The blocking checkpoint question raised for this clause.

disposition_overrides.description: Per-file/per-prefix status corrections applied before coverage initialization so overridden files never become audit tasks.

path.description: Path or path prefix to override.

status.description: Corrected file-disposition status (e.g. generated, vendor, excluded).

lens_selection.description: Accepted or modified lens set. `include` is additive (merged with mandatory lenses); `exclude` removes non-mandatory lenses. Both accept canonical and custom lens names.

design_review.description: Conceptual design-review depth confirmed by the host. Provider-neutral — records how much review to do, never which model runs it.

conceptual_depth.description: `shallow` (default when omitted) = one conceptual reviewer; `deep` = parallel independent reviewers compiled by an independent judge.

perspectives.description: Bounds the deep fan-out count; ignored when shallow.
